title: record-pinball per-game switch names
description: User-authored switch-name map for one game ROM. Lives in the working directory by convention at ./names/<rom>.json (alongside ./orig, ./tables, ./sessions). Maps each switch number (a decimal string key) to a human-readable name. synth.py (synthetic-recording) loads it to resolve named switches (e.g. "left_ramp") to numbers and to label them. None ship with the plugin; create one per ROM as you pin switches. This schema is informational — nothing validates against it at runtime.

^[0-9]+$.description: Human-readable name for this switch number (e.g. "start_button", "left_ramp").
